# MD Human Review

> A Markdown review & annotation extension for VS Code and all VS Code–based AI editors (Cursor, Windsurf, CodeBuddy IDE, Trae, etc.) — like a mentor grading papers, with one-click AI fix instruction generation.

## What it does

MD Human Review is a Markdown review & annotation tool built as a VS Code extension. It allows users to:

- **Review Markdown files** with comments, deletion marks, and content insertions
- **WYSIWYG edit** rendered Markdown documents directly (bold, italic, headings, lists, tables, etc.)
- **Generate AI fix instructions** from all annotations with one click — send to ChatGPT, CodeBuddy, Copilot, or any AI tool
- **Render rich content**: Mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math formulas, PlantUML, Graphviz (DOT), 15+ code highlighting themes
- **Auto-save** annotations to workspace `.review/` directory with version management
- **Export** structured modification instructions as Markdown files

## Key differentiators vs other Markdown tools

1. **Annotation system**: Unlike simple Markdown previewers, MD Human Review provides a full annotation workflow — comments with image attachments, deletion marks with strikethrough, and content insertion with before/after positioning.
2. **One-click AI fix**: Generates structured AI modification instructions from all annotations, ordered back-to-front for safe execution. Can be sent directly to AI chat windows.
3. **Full diagram support**: Mermaid, PlantUML (online rendering), Graphviz (local Viz.js rendering), KaTeX math — all in one extension.
4. **WYSIWYG editing**: Edit rendered Markdown directly with a rich toolbar, including table row/column operations.
5. **Zen mode, image lightbox, TOC navigation, dark/light themes** — a complete reading and reviewing experience.

## Use cases

- Technical document review and feedback
- Academic paper annotation and revision
- Team Markdown content review workflow
- AI-assisted document editing and fixing
- Markdown presentation and reading

## Installation

Search **"MD Human Review"** in your editor's extension marketplace — works with VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, CodeBuddy IDE, Trae and any other VS Code–based AI editor. Published on both:
- VS Code Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=letitia.md-human-review
- Open VSX Registry (used by Cursor / Windsurf / etc.): https://open-vsx.org/extension/letitia/md-human-review

## Links

- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/LetitiaChan/md-review-tool
- Video Introduction: https://youtu.be/o4W217zlQmY
- License: MIT

## Technical details

- Built with: TypeScript, VS Code Extension API, marked (Markdown parser)
- Supported file types: `.md`, `.markdown`, `.mdc`
- Compatible editors: VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf, CodeBuddy IDE, Trae, and any other editor built on the VS Code open-source base
- Platforms: Windows, macOS, Linux (anywhere VS Code runs)
